reasoning: The control SC-8(2) focuses on ensuring transmission confidentiality and integrity, which in Kubernetes can be addressed through enforcing TLS for network communications. This includes ensuring that NetworkPolicies enforce TLS, Ingress controllers are configured to use TLS, service meshes like Istio or Linkerd are configured for mutual TLS (mTLS), and the API server is configured to use TLS for secure communication.
title: Transmission Confidentiality And Integrity - Transmission confidentiality and integrity | pre - and post - transmission handl
